name: Valkyrie Toy Chica
description:
A militaristic version of Toy Chica from Five Nights TD, complete with heavy weaponry and flight!

This is one of my favorite towers in the game, and one of my favorite characters in the franchise, plus I love military stuff so I made this bot out of love for it all!

It is my first bot though, so PLEASE try to keep that in mind when (or if) you leave a review, sorry if its not super ultra good.

Art by NinjaButterFingers on Discord!

(Note: If the FNTD devs want me to private this or take it down, I will happily comply. Same for if NBD wants their art removed.)
creator: CoffeeQueenClown
